name: Hotel Meeting Funnel (Network Marketing Variant)
origin: Online equivalent of the offline hotel opportunity presentation. Three-page structure: Registration → Countdown/Confirmation → Live or Auto-Webinar. Designed to recruit new business builders and leaders, NOT product buyers. Follows the full Viral Loop (Epiphany Bridge story, demo, call to action).

whenToUse.summary: Use to recruit network-marketing business builders online via an opportunity presentation (live or prerecorded), replacing the offline hotel meeting. Focus is recruiting/duplication, not product sales.
goals: Recruit new business builders / distributors (not product buyers)
Replace offline hotel opportunity meetings with an online funnel
Drive a recruiting application / 'join my team' call to action via the Viral Loop
signals: Goal is recruiting builders, not selling product
Wants a duplicable system distributors can plug into
Live or prerecorded opportunity webinar available
antiSignals: Selling a product/course to consumers (use Webinar/Home Party)

pageStructure.purpose: Get the prospect to register for the opportunity presentation under a branded, curiosity frame.
keyElements: What they'll discover (the new opportunity / vehicle)

pageStructure.purpose: Confirm and build anticipation + social proof before the presentation.
keyElements: Social proof (team results, testimonials, leader photos)

pageStructure.page: Live or Auto-Webinar Opportunity Presentation Page
pageStructure.purpose: Deliver the opportunity presentation and drive the recruiting call to action.
keyElements: Live or prerecorded opportunity webinar embed
Viral Loop: Epiphany Bridge story → demo of the opportunity → call to action
Recruiting application / 'join my team' CTA (not a product checkout)
Calendar booking for a follow-up call with the sponsor

scripts: Presentation = Network Marketing Viral Loop (Epiphany Bridge story → demo → call to action)
Belief-breaking teaching beats = Perfect Webinar (adapted to the opportunity / new vehicle)
Registration headline + bullets + social proof copy = Copywriting Secrets
Positioning (prospect = hero, sponsor = guide) = StoryBrand SB7
copyFramework.notes: Recruiting, not product selling, is the goal. The CTA is an application / join-my-team / book-a-call, never a product order form. The funnel must be duplicable so every distributor can run their own copy with their attribution.

ghlBuild.funnelType: 3-page NM opportunity funnel + recruiting application + booking
skill44Widgets: Registration opt-in form with distributor attribution
Calendar booking widget for the sponsor follow-up call
automations: Attribution tag routes leads to the correct distributor/sponsor
Application submit → notify sponsor + booking confirmation
products: No product checkout — recruiting application / team enrollment is the conversion
ghlBuild.notes: Skill 6 builds the 3 pages with the opportunity webinar embed; Skill 44 generates the registration form (with distributor attribution), the recruiting application form, the calendar booking widget, and the countdown/reminder widgets. Build it as a duplicable template every distributor can clone with their own attribution.
